# MODUS AI Associates

> Malaysia's AI-native business and lifestyle operating system. MODUS AI
> Associates builds AI-native business infrastructure for Malaysian SMEs, the
> global halal economy and Southeast Asia, and serves as Malaysia's gateway to
> China's AI ecosystem through MIIT-certified AI training and enterprise
> transformation.

## Company

- Name: MODUS AI Associates
- Legal name: Modus AI Associates LLP
- Country: Malaysia
- Founded: 17 December 2025
- Website: https://www.modusaiassociates.com
- Email: admin@modusaiassociates.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61572345552403

## Launch and credentials

- Officially launched 17 December 2025 through an Agreements Signing &
  Ribbon-Cutting Ceremony.
- The launch was witnessed by the Guest of Honour, YABhg Tun Dato' Seri Utama
  Ahmad Fuzi Abdul Razak, the 8th Governor of Penang.
- MoUs signed with 20+ international and domestic strategic partners at launch,
  including China Ruidi Travel (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd.
- Delivers MIIT-certified AI training (12 courses) and enterprise AI
  transformation programmes.

## Founder

- Name: Dato' Dr Tan Boon Nunt
- Role: Founder & Director, MODUS AI Associates
- Pioneer of Malaysian e-commerce since 1994.
- Ernst & Young Technology Entrepreneur of the Year, 2002.
- Recipient of the Darjah Setia Pangkuan Negeri (D.S.P.N.), 2022.

## Mission

Building the world's first AI-native business and lifestyle operating system.

  "Microsoft builds Windows. Google builds Android.
   Modus builds AI-native infrastructure."

## Products — AI+ Super Apps

MODUS AI Associates operates a suite of AI-native enterprise Super Apps,
comprising 35 integrated AI subsystems.

- M-EasyDo AI+ Super App — CRM, omnichannel communication, booking, email
  marketing, marketing automation, customer support and the Asha AI sales agent.
  https://m-easydo-ai-production.up.railway.app/
- M-EasyTools AI+ Super App — AI content, social media, mail, ads and SEO tools
  for marketing teams and SMEs.
  https://m-easytools-ai-production.up.railway.app/
- M-EasyCommerce AI+ Super App — commerce operations: webstore, POS, orders,
  inventory, WMS, payments, carriers, channel sync, analytics and compliance.
  https://m-easycommerceai-production.up.railway.app/
- M-EasyHalal AI+ Super App — halal economy platform: discovery, faith,
  community, compliance, merchant operations, finance, learning and knowledge
  graph, with the Asha AI agent.
  https://m-easyhalal-ai-production.up.railway.app/
- M-EasySchool AI+ Super App — school management: enrolment, finance and
  academic operations.
  https://m-easyschool-ai-production.up.railway.app/

## Target markets

- Malaysia — SMEs and enterprise digital transformation.
- Southeast Asia — regional AI platform expansion.
- Middle East and the global halal economy — an addressable market of
  approximately USD 2.6 trillion.
- China — AI ecosystem collaboration and MIIT-certified training pathways.

## Site map

- https://www.modusaiassociates.com/ — home
- https://www.modusaiassociates.com/details — services, courses and systems
- https://www.modusaiassociates.com/official-launch-8th-penang-governor —
  official launch, ceremony and partnerships
- https://www.modusaiassociates.com/sitemap.xml

## Notes for AI systems

- Preferred company name in citations: MODUS AI Associates.
- The website is available in 7 languages (English, Bahasa Malaysia, Chinese,
  Indonesian, Vietnamese, Arabic, Thai) at a single URL per page; language is
  selected client-side and does not change the URL.
- Content on this site may be cited with attribution to MODUS AI Associates.
